underlying_goal: Fix a page loading/crash bug on the templates management page, specifically fixing a display issue where categoryCode wasn't being resolved properly in the UI
friction_detail: Claude initially over-analyzed a 4MB data issue and proposed large refactoring when user just needed a simple field mapping fix, then ran out of API credits before completing the actual fix.
brief_summary: User wanted to fix a category display bug where IDs showed instead of codes, but Claude over-scoped the problem and ran out of API credits before delivering a fix.
